narrative:
Precinct Goshen #3/Barnhill (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 801 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
